title: Egy tál lencse
actors: Katalin Karády, Pál Jávor, Gyula Csortos
plot: Margit takes a job on a rabbit farm in her friend's name and with her papers. She soon earns the trust of the owner the wealthy Mr. Kuglits and falls in love with his fired secretary, Sándor. They later find out out that Kuglits, ...
